channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Duplicati 2.3.0.1
item.description: Duplicati is a powerful backup application that helps you securely store encrypted, compressed, and incremental backups on cloud storage services or remote servers. The software supports many popular platforms such as Amazon S3, Google Drive, Microsoft OneDrive, Rackspace Cloud Files, as well as standard protocols like WebDAV, SSH, FTP, and many others. The application incorporates AES-256 encryption to protect data and also supports signatures using GNU Privacy Guard (GPG). Automatic...

item.title: Download Monkeys Audio 12.72
item.description: Monkey\'s Audio is software that compresses digital music without loss of quality. Supports high quality WAV files and CD ripping. Monkeys Audio will compress .wav tracks into .ape files to reduce their size without loss of sound quality, decompress .ape, convert files, check file integrity and manage tags. Unlike traditional methods like MP3 and OGG, which permanently remove quality to save space, Monkey\'s Audio only creates perfect copies with the same sound quality as the originals....

item.title: Download Runtime Captain Nemo Pro 7.06
item.description: Runtime Captain Nemo Pro is a software tool used to access data from NTFS formatted drives without an internet connection. Runtime Captain Nemo Pro supports a wide variety of NTFS-formatted drives, including HDDs, SSDs, RAID arrays, and virtual disks. The software can recover many different types of data, including photos, videos, documents and other file formats. item.title: Download Runtime NAS Data Recovery 4.06
item.description: Runtime NAS Data Recovery is a software tool designed to recover lost or deleted data from network attached storage (NAS) devices. A NAS device is a storage device that is connected to a network and provides access to multiple users. The software supports a wide variety of NAS devices and file systems, including well-known brands such as Synology, QNAP, Buffalo, NETGEAR, and more. It can recover many different types of data, including photos, videos, documents, and other file...

item.title: Download English Verb Conjugator Pro 3.10.3
item.description: View nearly 2000 English verbs in 20 tenses. With simple navigation and integrated search, you can find the verb you need in seconds. Now with audio!! Not sure how to pronounce a verb? Now you can hear how every verb is pronounced. Just tap the button next to the conjugation. Verbs with audio have a speaker icon next to them. Note: This feature requires an Internet connection. Includes copy, email, and SMS verb conjugation capabilities.
